title: Packers and Packagers, Hand
description: Pack or package by hand a wide variety of products and materials.

tasks.text: Examine and inspect containers, materials, or products to ensure that product quality and packing specifications are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Measure, weigh, and count products and materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record product, packaging, and order information on specified forms and records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Seal containers or materials, using glues, fasteners, nails, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble, line, and pad cartons, crates, and containers, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain, move, and sort products, materials, containers, and orders, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark and label containers, container tags, or products, using marking tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean containers, materials, supplies, or work areas, using cleaning solutions and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove completed or defective products or materials, placing them on moving equipment, such as conveyors, or in specified areas, such as loading docks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place or pour products or materials into containers, using hand tools and equipment, or fill containers from spouts or chutes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load materials and products into package processing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
